purpose: Test whether a fixed 60-day directional-count baseline produces a positive right-tailed trend payoff after locked costs, without tuning the baseline after observing results.
owner_authorization: User explicitly requested execution of B3 on 2026-07-15.

scope_decisions.primary_research_question: Does the signed baseline exhibit continuation and right-tail convexity across economically distinct global sleeves?
scope_decisions.current_capital_question: Does the same fixed baseline remain economically interpretable in a long-or-cash fractional-ETF branch at USD 1,000 and USD 2,000?
scope_decisions.futures: excluded_from_L1 because L-0 minimum capital is outside current scope; adding futures requires a new preregistration
scope_decisions.paid_action_rule: No paid action without a named data gap, true-provenance cost-ledger entry, remaining-room check, owner authorization, and smallest-recoverable-block rule.

signal.name: 60_day_directional_count_raw
signal.price_input: corporate-action-aware daily total-return close in instrument trading currency
signal.direction: d[i,t] = 1 if r[i,t] > 0; -1 if r[i,t] < 0; 0 if r[i,t] = 0 exactly
signal.missing_return_rule: Any missing return inside the 60-session window makes q missing; do not shorten the denominator or forward fill.
signal.scaling: none; do not apply the source paper's rolling three-year extreme scaling

research_signed.selection_time: locked before L-1 data acquisition and independent of L-1 returns
research_signed.interpretation: fixed surviving-proxy study, not a survivorship-clean claim about the historical ETF opportunity set
research_signed.replacement_rule: No performance-driven replacement. A symbol, inception, total-return, or tradability failure blocks the affected branch and is reported; a replacement requires a superseding preregistration.
research_signed.history_rule: Use only live ETF history on or after legal inception; index backfill and pre-inception synthetic history are forbidden.

implementable_long_or_cash.source: L-0 locked candidate order and E0 feasibility report
implementable_long_or_cash.eligibility_snapshot_rule: Before reading L-1 returns, record exact Webull Thailand green-diamond eligibility, minimum order, fractional precision, funding FX, and manual versus OpenAPI capability for every ticker.
implementable_long_or_cash.failure_rule: If fewer than 8 ordered sleeves have verified manual fractional eligibility, do not substitute; classify the current-capital branch scope_restricted and continue research only.
implementable_long_or_cash.api_rule: Webull global fractional documentation never proves Thailand OpenAPI fractional capability.

timing_and_calendar.calendar: NYSE trading sessions for the US-listed ETF proxies
timing_and_calendar.signal_timestamp: after the official close of the last NYSE trading session of each week
timing_and_calendar.decision_data: only records with availability_timestamp at or before that signal timestamp
timing_and_calendar.execution_timestamp: official close of the next NYSE trading session after the signal timestamp
timing_and_calendar.position_effective_interval: from that execution close until the next executable rebalance close
timing_and_calendar.holiday_rule: Use the actual last session of the week and the next actual NYSE session; never manufacture Friday rows.

asset_volatility.estimator: EWMA standard deviation of daily total returns

covariance.non_positive_semidefinite_rule: Apply deterministic eigenvalue clipping at zero and report the clipped eigenvalue mass; no other shrinkage in the primary run.

portfolio_construction.gross_normalization: If sum(abs(u)) > 0, normalize u to 90% gross exposure; otherwise hold cash.
portfolio_construction.target_volatility_scaling: Scale normalized weights down by min(1, 0.10 / predicted_portfolio_volatility); never scale up beyond normalized gross.
portfolio_construction.cap_algorithm: Clip at 25%, redistribute remaining gross pro rata among uncapped nonzero targets, repeat until no cap breach; any unallocatable residual stays cash.
portfolio_construction.risk_contribution_rule: Report ex-ante marginal and standalone contribution by asset and sleeve; do not silently rescale on an observed performance result.
portfolio_construction.rebalance_threshold: Trade only when absolute target-minus-current notional is at least 2% of current sleeve notional; opening or closing a zero position is not exempt.
portfolio_construction.research_trade_floor: No fixed-dollar floor; use the 2% threshold on a unit-NAV portfolio.
portfolio_construction.current_capital_trade_floor: maximum of USD 5, verified broker minimum, or 2% of current sleeve notional

primary_model.ETF_expense_ratio: accrue each instrument's then-current disclosed annual expense ratio daily on absolute held notional
primary_model.cash_yield: use the matched public 3-month Treasury total-return or yield series when available; otherwise set cash yield to zero and report a blocker
primary_model.funding_FX: exclude from recurring strategy PnL, report separately as a one-time current-capital implementation cost
primary_model.market_impact: not modeled; absence is an E2 scope blocker if order size exceeds 1% of 30-day ADV

costs.cost_booking: Deduct commission, spread/slippage, and sell surcharge at each executed notional change; accrue expenses, borrow, and cash return each session.

return_accounting.economic_return: Use corporate-action-aware total return built from raw close, splits, cash distributions, and capital returns; vendor adjusted close alone is a diagnostic fallback and blocks implementable claims.
return_accounting.signal_and_PnL_separation: Signal is fixed at the decision close; PnL begins only after the next-session execution close.
return_accounting.portfolio_return: previous effective weights times next-session instrument total returns plus cash return minus booked costs
return_accounting.short_return: signed instrument total return plus borrow cost; distributions owed by shorts are included by the total-return series
return_accounting.currency: USD portfolio accounting; underlying non-US currency exposure remains an economic exposure and must be labeled
return_accounting.risk_free_for_Sharpe: daily cash benchmark return; if unavailable, zero with an explicit blocker and mandatory sensitivity when cash data becomes available
return_accounting.bankruptcy_rule: Any portfolio NAV at or below zero is a hard failure; do not restart or clip the path.

benchmarks.matched_implementable: Always-long inverse-volatility portfolio on the same branch universe with identical volatility estimator, target-vol scaling, caps, rebalance timing, trade floor, and costs; replace q with +1 only.
benchmarks.cash: Public 3-month US Treasury cash return in USD, with source and availability timestamp recorded.
benchmarks.active_return: L-1 net return minus matched benchmark net return on identical dates.

sample_and_unlock_order.unlock_rule: Open untouched validation only after the falsification window passes data integrity, funds MinTRL_falsify using actual dependence estimates, does not meet the full falsification decision, and the locked validation window can fund every MinTRL_validate null after recalculation with those dependence estimates.
sample_and_unlock_order.underfunded_rule: If either stage is underfunded, stop at E1 scope_restricted; do not pool the windows to manufacture power.
sample_and_unlock_order.validation_reuse_rule: Once opened, the validation window cannot be reused to revise L-1; any revised hypothesis gets a new registry ID and later untouched data.

dual_MinTRL.actual_recalculation: Use observed lags 1-5 from the prior opened stage and cross-sectional eigenvalue participation ratio; report calendar observations, trades, overlap, time-effective observations, cross-sectional dimensions, and joint independent-bet equivalents separately.

regime_matrix.asset_whipsaw: At least 4 nonzero q-sign changes over the prior 20 signal dates and current abs(q) < 0.20.

global_state.broad_uptrend: at least 50% of available assets are uptrend and fewer than 25% are downtrend
global_state.broad_downtrend: at least 50% are downtrend and fewer than 25% are uptrend
global_state.whipsaw: at least 50% meet the asset-whipsaw rule

regime_matrix.volatility_state: Low, middle, or high according to expanding prior-only 33.3% and 66.7% quantiles of median 60-day asset volatility, with at least 756 prior sessions.
regime_matrix.minimum_validation_coverage: Each claimed global-state bucket needs at least 252 time-effective daily observations and 4 episodes separated by at least 60 sessions; otherwise restrict the claim.

payoff_and_concentration_tests.right_tail_ratio: 95th percentile of daily net return divided by absolute 5th percentile; pass if greater than 1.0.
payoff_and_concentration_tests.return_skewness: Population daily net-return skewness; pass if greater than 0.
payoff_and_concentration_tests.quadratic_convexity: OLS net strategy return on intercept, matched-benchmark return, and squared matched-benchmark return; pass if squared coefficient is positive with one-sided Newey-West t-statistic at least 1.645 using 5 lags.
payoff_and_concentration_tests.convex_payoff_gate: At least two of right-tail ratio, positive skewness, and quadratic convexity must pass, and quadratic convexity is mandatory for an explicit convexity claim.
payoff_and_concentration_tests.asset_contribution_concentration: Largest asset share of total positive PnL must be at most 35%; report Herfindahl index across positive asset contributions.
payoff_and_concentration_tests.episode_definition: Per asset, a trend episode is consecutive weekly nonzero q of one sign; allow at most one neutral rebalance between same-sign observations and end on opposite sign or two consecutive neutral rebalances.
payoff_and_concentration_tests.largest_episode_concentration: Largest positive asset-episode share of total positive PnL must be at most 50%.
payoff_and_concentration_tests.best_market_removal: Remove the asset with greatest full-window net PnL, hold its weight as cash, and recompute every metric without re-optimizing.
payoff_and_concentration_tests.best_trend_removal: Set the largest positive asset-episode PnL contribution to cash over its original dates and recompute without re-optimizing.
payoff_and_concentration_tests.removal_pass: After each removal, net geometric return remains positive and PSR versus zero is at least 0.90.

falsified: Actual joint independent-bet equivalents in the falsification window meet or exceed 3850.
Primary research_signed annualized net geometric return is non-positive and PSR for exceeding annual Sharpe 0.25 is at most 0.05.
The right-tail ratio is at most 1.0 and net geometric return is non-positive in at least two adequately covered global-state buckets.
A mechanism autopsy attributes the failure among continuation, breadth, whipsaw, sizing, cost, or data mechanisms.
decision_rules.not_falsified_but_not_validated: Any partial pass, underpowered result, missing regime, data limitation, cost uncertainty, or failure to fund every validation null remains E1 and scope_restricted.
validation_grade_candidate: Untouched validation was opened only through the sequential unlock rule and supplies at least 8673 joint independent-bet equivalents.
Primary net geometric return is positive; PSR is at least 0.95 against zero, annual Sharpe 0.25, and zero active Sharpe versus the matched benchmark.
DSR probability is at least 0.95 using the complete locked trial log and effective-trial rule.
Convex payoff, concentration, best-market removal, best-trend removal, cost sensitivity, and required regime coverage pass.
No critical survivorship, timestamp, corporate-action, currency, or implementation blocker remains.
decision_rules.E2_promotion: Even if every validation-grade-candidate rule passes, status remains E1 until a separate adversarial review is completed with no unresolved critical issue.
decision_rules.current_capital_outcome: Report separately for USD 1,000 and USD 2,000; it cannot validate the research_signed branch or approve deployment.

search_and_robustness.primary_never_changes: 60-day directional count with the primary cost and sizing rules
search_and_robustness.effective_trials_for_DSR: maximum of 5 and the effective-rank estimate from the complete trial-return correlation matrix
search_and_robustness.selection_rule: Never select a sensitivity as the L-1 result; all trials and failures remain in the search log.
search_and_robustness.unexpected_debug_run_rule: Any run that reads returns is logged as a trial even when labeled debugging; implementation-only synthetic fixture tests are not trials.

data_integrity.point_in_time_rule: The study is conditional on fixed preregistered proxies; do not generalize to the historical ETF opportunity set or project current membership backward.
data_integrity.delisting_rule: A delisting during the test remains in the path through its final distribution or documented terminal-value rule; do not drop its history.
data_integrity.backfill_rule: Reject observations before legal inception and flag provider first-available dates that precede inception.
data_integrity.corporate_action_rule: Raw close, splits, distributions, and total-return construction must reconcile; silent adjusted-close revisions create a new dataset version.
data_integrity.FX_rule: Record trading currency and economic region; USD listing does not remove underlying FX exposure.
data_integrity.futures_roll_rule: Not applicable because futures are excluded. Any futures row is a hard schema failure for L-1.
data_integrity.provider_drift_rule: Boundary-schema failure blocks execution; do not coerce renamed or missing fields.
data_integrity.hash_rule: Every input container and normalized/derived artifact follows datasets/registry.json container or dual-hash policy and records the producing commit.
data_integrity.missingness_rule: No price forward fill and no silent complete-case date deletion; portfolio dates and unavailable assets are reported explicitly.

B4_report_requirements: hypothesis_id L-1, evidence tier, tier blockers, edge claim, and producing git commit
environment and dataset IDs/hashes plus complete search log
gross and primary/sensitivity net returns with turnover, exposure, leverage, cash, and cost decomposition
calendar observations, trades, holding overlap, autocorrelations, time-effective observations, cross-sectional dimensions, and joint independent-bet equivalents
PSR, DSR, dual-MinTRL funding, unlock decision, and untouched-data status
trend/whipsaw, volatility, sleeve, country/region, subperiod, and diagnostic crisis matrices
right-tail, skewness, quadratic convexity, contribution concentration, best-market removal, and best-trend removal
survivorship, inception/backfill, corporate-action, currency, broker, and current-capital limitations
machine JSON and matching Markdown with exact next safe action
hard_stops: L-1 return or backtest execution during B3
opening untouched validation before the sequential unlock
paid action without the locked cost-guard workflow
credential, account identifier, or order transmission
pre-inception history, survivor substitution, or silent adjusted-close backfill
in-place change to this preregistration or validator after hashing
edge, E2, paper-trading, or deployment claim from B3
